citations.description: No CI run results, test output artifacts, or recorded test-pass markers found in the repository or ticket comments. The ticket has no comments and the 'verify_commands' field is empty.

findings.criterion: Behaviour-preserving: full reconcile unit+integration suite green; whole test tree still collects cleanly.
findings.detail: This criterion requires running the full test suite to confirm it passes. The code changes are structurally sound (no stubs, correct injection wiring confirmed), but there is no artifact in the repository or ticket that records test execution results. The criterion is untagged (codebase-verifiable), yet its pass/fail is intrinsically an execution-time outcome that cannot be confirmed by reading source files alone.
findings.remediation: Run the full test suite (make test or pytest) and record the output as a ticket comment or CI artifact. If tests pass, close or re-attest this criterion with the CI run URL or test output.

citations.description: No CI run artifacts, make output, or recorded tool-pass markers exist in the repository or ticket. The ticket comments list is empty and verify_commands is empty.

findings.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
findings.detail: This criterion requires running make lint, make typecheck, and make test and observing all green. These are execution-time outcomes that cannot be confirmed by reading source files. The ticket has no recorded CI run output, no test artifacts, and no comments attesting to successful tool execution. The criterion is untagged (codebase-verifiable), so it cannot be satisfied by an attestation without the code evidence being present.
findings.remediation: Run 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' and attach the output (or a CI run link) as a ticket comment. Once the run is confirmed green, this criterion can be marked met.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
